name: Getac Technology Corporation
summary: Getac Technology Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of various information products in China, the United States, Europe, and internationally. The company provides notebooks, printer and its components, DVDs, mobile phones, digital cameras, PCBs, personal computers, communication equipment, automobile electronic devices, precision dies, casting/forging raw parts for automobiles and motorcycles, and magnesium alloy castings, as well as engages in the wholesale and retail of data management, software, electronic equipment, and mold related and e-communication products. It also offers various mechanical solutions, such as engineering design, prototyping and pilot run, tooling, and mass production and assembly services of plastic and metal stamping parts and modules; aluminum alloy and magnesium alloy automotive die-cast parts; and fasteners for aerospace and high-end industrial applications. In addition, the company provides repair and maintenance, and technical services for computers and related products; and sells smart mobile monitoring solutions. Further, it operates as an agency of domestic/foreign freight transport and import/export declaration, and import/export trade. Its products are used in military and industrial computer system applications. The company was formerly known as MiTAC Technology Corporation and changed its name to Getac Technology Corporation in 2009. Getac Technology Corporation was incorporated in 1989 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan. Getac Technology Corporation operates as a subsidiary of MiTAC-SYNNEX Group.
